evals.name: scaffold-ci-hardened
evals.prompt: Set up a CI workflow for this project. It should run on push to main and pull requests. I'm using Node.js. Make sure it's secure and follows best practices.
assertions: permissions block present with contents: read
scripts/lint.sh was called to validate the workflow

evals.name: release-oidc-aws
evals.prompt: Create a release workflow that deploys to AWS S3 when a tag is pushed. Use OIDC for authentication.
assertions: Uses OIDC action pinned to SHA

evals.name: batch-close-issues
evals.prompt: I need a script that closes all open issues in this repo that have the 'stale' label. It should be safe to run in CI.
